meaning: adv.呈白色地 显得苍白地
examples: It's good there. Quiet. Fresh-aired. White swans swam around whitely.
He squeezed her skin in opposite directions until it stretched whitely.
Whitely P, Haracopos D, Knivsberg AM, Reichelt KL, Parlar S, Jacobsen J, Seim A, Pedersen L, Schondel M, Shattock P.
Far down something flutters whitely, like a handkerchief.
